account.title: Account settings
account.subtitle: Manage your profile and preferences.
account.displayNameHelp: This is how you will appear to others.

logoutConfirm.title: Log out?
logoutConfirm.body: Your current session will end. You will need to sign in again to continue.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete account
deleteConfirm.body: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently removed. Type the confirmation phrase below to proceed.

security.title: Active sessions
security.subtitle: Manage the devices that are currently signed into your account. Logging out of a device will immediately end its session.
security.revokeAll: Log out of all other devices

revokeConfirm.title: Log out of this device?
revokeConfirm.body: The selected session will end immediately.

revokeAllConfirm.title: Log out of all other devices
revokeAllConfirm.body: All sessions other than the current one will be terminated. You will need to sign in again on those devices.

library.subtitle: Projects in progress and saved notes

binary.notice: This file cannot be shown as text.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome back. Review today's study tasks and AI suggestions.

summary.title: Today's Study Summary
summary.empty: No summary has been generated yet.

auth.idOnlyNotice: We only obtain an identifier for your account. We do not store your email address or name.
auth.consentBefore: By continuing, you agree to our

hero.title: Advanced cognition for knowledge professionals.
hero.subtitle: Streamline your research, project management, and study notes with a tool designed for high-density information environments.

synthesis.title: Automated Synthesis
synthesis.body: Transform fragmented notes into structured outlines instantly. Our AI models are fine-tuned for scholarly citation and logical coherence in professional knowledge environments.

library.title: Contextual Library
library.body: A document-first approach to information storage. Every PDF, note, and recording is indexed by concept rather than file name, allowing semantic retrieval across your entire workspace.

research.title: Research Intelligence
research.body: Query your entire knowledge base using natural language. kioku understands complex hierarchies of information, identifying relationships between disparate projects and disciplines.

collaborate.title: Collaborative Logic
collaborate.body: Multi-player environments built for research groups. Version control for ideas, shared semantic spaces, and real-time synthesis of group insights without the overhead of traditional tools.

cta.title: Scale your knowledge potential.
cta.body: Join thousands of professionals using kioku to capture, connect, and recall everything that matters.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
paragraphs: Welcome to kioku (the "Service"). These Terms of Service (the "Terms") set out the conditions under which you may use the Service. By accessing or using the Service, you agree to be bound by all provisions of these Terms.
If you do not agree to these Terms, please discontinue use of the Service immediately. We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time without prior notice.

definitions.title: 2. Definitions
definitions.lead: The following terms shall have the meanings set forth below when used in these Terms.

items.desc: refers to the entity that operates kioku.
refers to any individual or legal entity that registers for or uses the Service.
refers to all information made available through the Service, including text, audio, images, and data.
refers to the artificial intelligence technologies and algorithms that we provide within the Service.

service.title: 3. Use of the Service
service.intro: Subject to your compliance with these Terms and applicable laws, you are granted a non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use the Service.
service.prohibitedLead: You may not engage in any of the following activities.
prohibitedItems: Acts that violate laws, court judgments, decisions or orders, or legally binding administrative measures.
Acts that may harm public order or morals.
Acts that infringe the intellectual property rights, including copyrights, trademarks, and patents, the rights of honor, privacy, or any other legal or contractual rights of us or any third party.
Acts that interfere with the servers or network systems of the Service, or that abuse the Service through bots, cheat tools, or other technical means.
Acts of using AI Models to generate harmful, discriminatory, or illegal content.

account.title: 4. User Accounts
account.body: Some features of the Service require account registration. Users are responsible for providing accurate and truthful information and keeping it up to date at all times.
account.callout: Users are solely responsible for any damages arising from inadequate management of account credentials, errors in use, or use by third parties; we accept no liability. If you discover unauthorized use of your account, please contact us immediately.

privacy.title: 5. Privacy and Data
paragraphs: We respect your privacy and handle personal information appropriately. For details on how we collect, use, and share personal information, please refer to our Privacy Policy.

Data you input into the Service (such as prompts and uploaded files) may be used to provide the Service and to improve the quality of our AI Models. We recommend that you do not input confidential information or sensitive personally identifiable information.

ip.title: 6. Intellectual Property
paragraphs: Intellectual property rights in the Service and all programs, software, trademarks, and logos related to the Service belong to us or to third parties holding legitimate rights.

The treatment of copyrights and other rights in content generated by users through the Service shall be governed by the rights in the underlying source data and the applicable laws of the relevant country. We do not claim ownership of user-generated content but are granted a right to use it to the extent necessary to operate the Service.

kioku ("we" or "us") takes your privacy extremely seriously. This Privacy Policy describes what information we collect, and how we use and protect it, in connection with our AI-powered learning platform (the "Service").

collected.title: 1. Information We Collect
collected.lead: To deliver the Service effectively, we collect the following information.

items.desc: Name, email address, affiliated institution, and other information provided when you create an account.
Learning materials such as PDFs, documents, and images that you intentionally upload for AI-based analysis or summarization.
Logs of questions, prompts, and generated responses involving the AI assistant (used to maintain learning context).
Technical information such as access logs, device information, and IP addresses, used to monitor system performance and maintain security.

aiCommitment.title: 2. Our Commitments on AI Models and Data Use
aiCommitment.lead: We recognize that, given the educational nature of the Service, materials you upload may contain highly sensitive information. We strictly adhere to the following principles.

cards.title: Not used to train foundation models
cards.body: Personal learning materials, notes, and PDFs uploaded by users are not used as training data for kioku's overall AI foundation models.

cards.title: Tenant isolation
cards.body: Your data is logically isolated, and another customer's AI will never generate responses based on the contents of your documents.

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing and Third Parties
sharing.lead: We do not share, sell, or rent your personal information or uploaded data to third parties, except in the following cases.
items: When you have given explicit consent.

When it is necessary to use external infrastructure providers (such as cloud hosting or specific AI API providers) that are essential to delivering the Service. We enter into strict data processing agreements with these providers and prohibit any use of data outside the agreed purposes.
When disclosure is required by law.

retention.title: 4. Data Retention and Deletion
paragraphs: We retain your data only while your account remains active or as long as necessary to provide the Service. You may request complete deletion of your data and your account at any time from the account settings screen. Once we receive a deletion request, your data — including backups — will be securely erased from our systems.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
rights.lead: You have the following rights with respect to your data.

cards.title: Data export
cards.body: You can download your saved notes and conversation history in a standard format.

cards.title: Complete deletion
cards.body: The right to immediately delete specific uploaded files or your entire account.

contact.title: 6. Contact Us
contact.lead: For any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data handling practices, or to exercise your rights, please contact us at the address below.
